calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ross McLauran Madden, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Robert Gish, Timothy Bacci and Syntrio, Inc., a California corporation, none of whom were present at today's hearing.
Douglas Page, Vice President for plaintiff Syntrio, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant David Carlyle.
Default was entered as to defendant David Carlyle on February 3, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 2, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Syntrio, Inc., a California corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant David Carlyle as follows:

Damages/Principal - $2,632,955.00.
Punitive Damages - $2,362,955.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $4,725,910.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
